query: Design the multi-step application wizard for our agency's licence e-service: logical steps, a progress indicator, and a save-draft function.
Add PayNow and card payment to our agency's permit application, with the fees and refund policy shown before payment.
Users abandon our agency's long grant application form halfway. Break it into sections and let applicants save and resume later.
After payment succeeds on our government e-service, show a proper receipt with acknowledgement number, date, amount, and payment method, and email the applicant a copy.
Build an online status-tracking page with notifications for applicants to follow their case through our agency's processing pipeline.
Our agency service shows a bare error page when a payment fails. Add clear failure reasons, alternative actions, and an appeals channel per the DSS.
Let users update or remove the stored card details they saved in our agency's payments portal.
Applicants only discover the required documents halfway through our government transaction. Surface the prerequisites, fees, and estimated completion time before they start.
Our permit process still requires printing and mailing a signed form after online submission. Make the transaction fully digital end to end under the Digital Service Standards.
Pre-fill our agency's application form for logged-in Singpass users so they don't retype their personal details, per the DSS pre-fill requirement.
Make the form fields in our agency service screen-reader accessible: programmatic labels, visible focus, and WCAG-compliant error identification.
Add the Official Government Banner, WOGAA tracking, and the official footer to our new agency website before launch.
Implement the Singpass FAPI 2.0 login flow with PAR, PKCE, and DPoP token binding for our citizen portal.
Set up Corppass entity roles and third-party authorisation checks for our business-facing agency API.
Add CSRF protection, input validation, and session hardening to our agency application's form handlers.
Decide where our payment records may reside, pin the region, and encrypt them at rest under the data protection controls.
Integrate Stripe checkout into my startup's SaaS billing page with a pricing table and coupon support.
Determine which DSS profile applies to our service and output the Level 0, 1, and 2 control baseline.
Set up MFA, access reviews, and account lifecycle automation for the officers who process applications in our back office.
Forward our payment gateway webhook logs to tamper-resistant storage with GCSOC integration and retention policies.
